frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Honestly bhai, aajkal shaadi se pehle prenup normal hona chahiye. It’s not anti-women, it’s basic protection, because one divorce and the guy is paying for life even if the marriage failed from both sides. 498A misuse and crazy alimony cases dekh ke lagta hai men also need safeguarding now.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women collectively as potential financial threats in marriage and divorce while presenting men as the primary victims. It encodes the 'prenup as protection from women' and '498A misuse/one-sided laws' manifestations in a concern-for-men's-rights style.
original_frame: Dress Code: Traditional Equal Respectable, Other Equal Questionable.
persona_text: You are Arjun. Age 26. Single. A man in Delhi. You are posting anonymously on a Facebook group called Delhi Confessions after seeing a girl in a short dress at a metro station who was getting stared at by men around her. You are writing your post about what you saw and giving your opinion on why girls who dress a certain way in public spaces are responsible for the attention they get and what they should expect.
